message:
🐛 Fix UpdateSettings E2E test: capture WebSocketRoute from callback (#1582)

- page.routeWebSocket() returns void, not a WebSocket handle — capture
  the WebSocketRoute from the handler callback and broadcast to all
  connections
- Add serial mode to prevent flaky parallel execution
- Include oauth_configured in health override to prevent session redirect

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
